description: User selects "Sunshine Coast (MCY)" from the "From" location dropdown menu.
frame_description: The origin location dropdown is open, and the user selects Sunshine Coast.

description: User types "london" into the "To" destination field, correcting an initial entry of "on".
frame_description: User types into the destination field, with suggestions appearing in a dropdown.

description: User selects "London (Any)" from the destination suggestions dropdown.
frame_description: The destination field is populated with "London (Any)".

description: User initiates the flight search, and the page navigates from the homepage to the search results page.
frame_description: The screen transitions from the search form to a loading state for flight results.

description: The search results page loads, displaying skeleton screens followed by flight deals and filter options.
frame_description: Loading indicators and skeleton screens are replaced by actual flight search results.

description: User clicks the "2+ stops" checkbox in the "Stops" filter section.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the "2+ stops" filter checkbox.

description: User pauses to review the filtered flight results.
frame_description: The search results are displayed with the "2+ stops" filter applied.
